# Company Settings

Set up your company profile and business operating hours.

## Company Information

Configure at **Settings > Company**:
- Company name and legal name
- Business address
- Phone and email contact
- Website

## Business Schedule

Define your standard operating hours for each day of the week. These hours are used by the AI optimizer when scheduling jobs.

### Holidays

Add company holidays to prevent job scheduling on non-working days.
